ORDER OVERRULING DEFENDANT GAP'S DEMURRER

LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANT THE GAP, INC.'S DEMURRER TO MY RED SHOES' COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT GAP'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S SINGLE CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER BUS. & PROF. CODE 17200, ET SEQ. IS OVERRULED. A DEMURRER'S ONLY FUNCTION IS TO TEST THE "LEGAL SUFFICIENCY OF A COMPLAINT." (DONABEDIAN V. MERCURY INS. CO. (2004) 116 CAL.APP.4TH 968, 994.) DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHOW THAT PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO STATE A CLAIM UNDER 17200. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Set For Trial On Nov-02-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant The Gap, Inc.'S Demurrer To Complaint (For Entry Of The Tentative Ruling Only)
Off Calendar Feb-11-2020 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan Weissglass, Esq. 510-836-4200 for Plaintiff.
Joe Duffy, Esq. 213-612-7378 of Morgan Lewis for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces it did not receive an email contesting the tentative ruling. Defendant argues the unlawful prong of the UCL. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE GAP, INC.'s DEMURRER TO MY RED SHOES' COMPLAINT.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant Gap's demurrer to Plaintiff's single cause of action under Bus. & Prof. Code 17200, et seq. is overruled. A demurrer's only function is to test the "legal sufficiency of a complaint." (Donabedian v. Mercury Ins. Co. (2004) 116 Cal.App.4th 968, 994.) Defendant fails to show that Plaintiff is unable to state a claim under 17200. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
